# Day 2
I lunapicked Gdow last night.
I am the **Choirboy** but actually the **Drunk** since we don't have a King.

I am the Recluse. Sorry if I registered as evil to anyone. 
And if I didn’t register as evil to you I’m remembering that.

Ok! Now that I've chatted everyone: I'm the noble, pings are butti/Jeff/Diddy. I've chatted with all, and don't have strong feelings about who it might be, if my info is accurate. 

Through my many whispers, we tentatively have TC and FG in play, so if we can have a reasonable number of noms and have some (different each day) folks agree not to vote each day, that'll really help build info quickly (or demonstrate vortox before long).

<@&1339576885096743034> I was the magician btw, i have avoided saying it because i was curious/waiting to see how people whispered after my death. It may still be legion, but if not rabbit's reason for hanging me was because a seamstress got a "no" on me and him. rabbit is evil or the seamstress is. I do wonder if it's legion because no one seemed particularly afraid to hang me, but I also may have telegraphed myself as magician a bit too hard to <@273249730568650763> , who i claimed to be a minion to and she did not mention again to me or anyone else afaik. Prolly's choir boy thing is also retarded but I don't know if discount would do that.

I have hard claimed and have done nothing suspicious, unlike you who instantly claimed lunatic before you even had the info to be sure you weren’t the real demon.

Don’t have suicidal empathy because you are mad I bullied 89 last game.

<@&1339576885096743034>
